title: Mildly Spiced German Bratwurst Burger
description: A grassy and crunchy German-inspired burger featuring bratwurst sausage and topped with sauerkraut and caramelized onions. Perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Split the bread rolls in half and toast them in the oven for 5 minutes.
Pan-fry the bratwurst sausage in peanut oil over medium-high heat until browned, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Transfer the sausage to a plate and cover with foil to keep warm.
Add the sliced onions to the same pan and cook over medium heat until caramelized, stirring occasionally, about 10-12 minutes.
Add the drained sauerkraut to the pan and cook until heated through, about 2-3 minutes.
Assemble the burgers by spreading a layer of sauerkraut and caramelized onions on the bottom bun, followed by a bratwurst sausage and finally the top bun.
Season with salt, pepper, paprika, and caraway seeds to taste.
